title: History of Intelligent Textbooks & Interactive Learning Timeline
description: An interactive vis-timeline tracing the key ideas behind intelligent textbooks, MicroSims, and interactive digital learning — from Piaget's constructivism and knowledge spaces through generative AI, Claude Code, and the 100th open intelligent textbook — with filters for Theory of Learning, Learning Graphs, and Generative AI.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: intelligent textbooks
learning theory
learning graphs
generative AI
history of education technology

educational.audience: High school and adult learners; educators and instructional designers

pedagogical.learningObjective: Students will trace the intellectual lineage of intelligent textbooks and analyze how each idea built on the ones before it to promote critical thinking.
pedagogical.interactionPattern: Chronological explorer with category filters and click-for-detail
